Bloodforge Bracers  
 


Slot: WRIST
AC: 5
WT: 3.5 Size: SMALL
Class: WAR CLR PAL
Race: DWF
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)
Bloodforge Bracers

Slot: WRIST
AC: 5
WT: 3.5 Size: SMALL
Class: WAR CLR PAL
Race: DWF
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

Item Type:Armor
Appearance:Chain
Tint:
 
Color (RGB):73, 7, 1
Stackable:No
Merchant Value:0 pp 4 gp 0 sp 0 cp
Tribute:6
Lucy Entry By:Makrill Fiskhuvve
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-07-27 02:41:29
Page Updated:Thu May 4th, 2017

Expansion: Original
Average Price: 16pp Pricing Data...
Rarity: Uncommon
Level to Attain: 10
[Comments ]

This item is the result of a quest.
Expansion List - Premium only.
Quest Name
Ogre Heads

Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
South Kaladim


Uploaded November 27th, 2008
Send a correction
Post Comment
zarchoomi and corflunk
QuoteReply
# Jan 27 2006 at 7:36 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591873455831
30 posts
i killed zarchoomi earlier this week.she was next to the POK book just staring at me.i was a lvl 20 dwarf cleric and that is why she didn't agro.i just killed corflunk just east of the crossroads.he was easy.zarchoomi was harder.both times i came across them by accident.
▲ Page top
Location of orges
QuoteReply
# Feb 10 2002 at 11:26 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592758948657
2 posts
Is there any place they hang out in BB, do they hang out in pairs or are they sepearate. I killed an orge once in BB and i just gave it to someone, i guess it was one of their heads
▲ Page top
RE: Location of orges
QuoteReply
# Sep 10 2004 at 6:33 PM Rating: Decent
Nildail
Scholar
114 posts
Zarchoomi and Corflunk are the Ogres for this quest. Zarchoomi is a shaman and I've found her to be the tougher of the two. Corflunk appears to be a warrior. Normally, only one is up at a time, but have fought both at the same time before - just once though. Normally, they wander around the southern part of the zone, from the crossroads to the dwarf huts near the Wayfarers camp (but I've seen mostly seen them near the crossroads) - found them twice near the southern goblin camp, encountered Zarchoomi once at the Druid ring.

This is not to say they can't be found elsewhere in the zone, this is just what I have observed in the almost 5 years I've been playing.
▲ Page top
RE: Location of orges
QuoteReply
# Jul 23 2003 at 1:04 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593362390308
20 posts
The two ogres that you want are Zarchoomi and Corflunk. They hang out in the area between the dwarf pottery merchant (near Gfay zone) and the first cross roads with a guard house. At least that is where I have seen them. I have also run into Zarchoomi at the enterance to Kaladim, behind the guards. Only happened once so it might have been a bug *shrug*.
I have never killed Cornflunk, but Zarchoomi is a shammy, so she will slow you and dot you. Hope this helps.
▲ Page top
RE: Location of orges
QuoteReply
# Apr 02 2003 at 6:16 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591783803433
49 posts
ogres....theres 2 kinds in BBM. The wandering green bloods can be found wandering the paths past the crossroad. The others (i cant remember there names..) anyway, theres a camp of them PAST DAGNORS CAULDRON FOLLOWING THE WALL TO THE LEFT

they are definetly tougher than the green bloods, as they conned dark blue to me when i was lvl 18.

Peace love on the Turnpike

▲ Page top
Quest for Experience
QuoteReply
# May 11 2001 at 10:34 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591749847760
29 posts
I got one half bubble for turning in two heads and one quarter bubble for each kill. Thats one full bubble experience for a relatively simple quest for a level 10 Pally. Thats the reason to do this quest. Second reason to do this quest is for a chance for the Helm.
▲ Page top

# Apr 28 2001 at 4:59 AM Rating: Default

who ever said that back there is right I made a lot of cash doing this quest even at level 20 druid i made 300pp so far getting and selling these peices of bloodforge

Non Dwarf
QuoteReply
# Apr 27 2001 at 10:37 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I just completed this quest as a 10th lvl Wood Elf Ranger, and still found it to be worth the trouble. For a non-twink character at this lvl those items are worth serious money.
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Apr 24 2001 at 2:34 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Dude saves rule!! If you get +5 to all saves at lvl 11 be happy, you will enjoy it when that goblin wiz doesnt land for a full hit. Hell the Dreadscale Helm (Iksar Sk quest armor you can do at 40) has +5 sv to all and it rocks! Moma you are a major a**, and a big friggin idiot. Please quit playing the game until you know better.
RE: save crap????

▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Jun 20 2001 at 8:32 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) You tell em d00d... your supperior show of force will show us never to have
#Anonymous, Posted: Apr 04 2001 at 7:28 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) As a dwarf i think bloodforge armor is kind of crappy. It doesn't raise anything so why would you want to wear it? At leats like bronze has more ac and my fine plate has a ton more ac so why would you want to wear it besides its cool look?
#Anonymous, Posted: Apr 23 2001 at 11:01 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Ahh you must be one of those guy's who takes your 30th level guy and does all your lower level guy's quests, and then when some people who should be there arrive you act hostile and say some lude stuff on how you have it camped. You make me sick.
#Anonymous, Posted: Apr 16 2001 at 12:40 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Stupid twink, **** the f*** up. Don't down an item meant for it's level. Some people can't afford better armor and this only provides an alt. piece to acquire through an okay quest. it's bragging twinks like you who I love to duel any day. I bet you can't even punch your way out of a paper bag without the use of a WurmSlayer. I would even go so far as to bet you can't even play in groups well. Do you mock your fellow players for wearing banded still? Ya silly hoe. Wisen up.
correction on Reward

This quest drops all pieces of Bloodforge armor not just the bracers...all but the bracers are lore, the helm is the best drops...it is exactly like a blackened iron helm except dwarf only.

#Anonymous, Posted: Apr 04 2001 at 7:31 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) So the bloodforge helm has 5strength? i have the blackened iron crown and I thought it was better. It also has alot of sv crap
